{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Flowing Sword Enforcer
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Flowing Sword Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Flowing Sword Enforcer]] is a technique used on [[Netherclaw]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
